title: Wildly Yeasty Vietnamese Fish Fillet Double Fry
description: A yeasty and molten Vietnamese dish featuring fish fillet with a double fry method, similar to KFC, and is egg-free friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine yeast, flour, cornstarch, salt, sugar, and garlic.
Add the fish fillet pieces to the bowl and coat evenly with the yeast mixture.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Double fry the fish fillet pieces by frying them for 3 minutes, then letting them rest for 2 minutes, and finally frying them again for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the fried fish fillet from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the wildly yeasty Vietnamese fish fillet double fry hot and enjoy.
To make the dish more adventurous, serve with a side of spicy Vietnamese chili sauce.
Garnish with chopped scallions and a sprinkle of toasted sesame seeds for added flavor and texture.
